## Problem

<!-- What behavior or risk does this change address? -->

## Implementation

<!-- Summarize the approach and important tradeoffs. -->

## Security and compatibility

<!-- Describe package, signer, UID, SELinux, permission, storage, Wayland, ABI, or lifecycle effects. -->

## Validation

<!-- List commands, Android versions, devices/emulators, ABIs, and package versions tested. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within Android's package, permission, storage, lifecycle, and installer boundaries.
- [ ] Shared behavior is implemented in a shared layer rather than as an app-specific workaround.
- [ ] Relevant automated or manual regressions pass.
- [ ] User-facing or architecture documentation is updated.
- [ ] No secrets, signing files, SDKs, downloaded packages, or build outputs are included.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots.
